summary: Iteration 39 - v6.0.0 Morning Briefing Feature PASSED. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: v6.0.0 in footer, Settings > Advanced > Telegram shows all 7 alert toggles including 'Morning Briefing', and 'Send Morning Briefing Now' button present.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/health returns version=6.0.0, routes_loaded=13, morning_briefing object with running=true
VERIFIED: POST /api/telegram/morning-briefing sends morning briefing and returns status=success
VERIFIED: GET /api/telegram/status returns 7 alert types including morning_briefing, and morning_briefing status with sent_count>=1
VERIFIED: POST /api/telegram/alerts can toggle morning_briefing ON/OFF
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/ai-guards/status returns all 8 guards
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/position-sizing returns kelly with trading_mode
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/options/greeks works correctly with parameters
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Settings > Advanced > Telegram shows 7 alert toggles (New Signals, Trade Entry, Trade Exit, Daily P&L Summary, Guard Blocks, Exit Advisor, Morning Briefing)
FRONTEND VERIFIED: 'Send Morning Briefing Now' button present with orange/yellow gradient
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Morning Briefing toggle shows description 'Subah 9 AM pe market outlook + AI analysis'
context_for_next_testing_agent: v6.0.0 Morning Briefing feature fully verified. New feature: Morning Briefing sends automatic market briefing at 9:00 AM IST weekdays with Nifty/BankNifty prices, yesterday's P&L, open positions, and AI-generated market outlook via GPT-4o. Manual trigger via POST /api/telegram/morning-briefing. Frontend has 7th alert toggle 'Morning Briefing' and 'Send Morning Briefing Now' button. All 8 AI Guards active. Telegram fully configured with 7 alert types enabled. Market is currently CLOSED (Saturday).
